subcodes.first_line: O faithful friend! Thou art sheltered within the protection of thy Lord and abidest beneath the shade of the All-Forgiving's favors, the object of His gracious regard [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار وفادار در صون حمایت پروردگاری و در ظل الطاف آمرزگار منظور نظر عنایتی و
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @consolation and comfort
